titles.title: It's the Life Behind the Name

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's the life behind the Name, That makes the demons tremble. It's the life behind the Name, That makes the proud heart humble.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It was God who devised a plan, That in all things like a man, He would live, so He could give To us the life behind the Name.
